name: hoc/faq-section
description: A ready-to-use FAQ section HOC that renders a list of question-answer pairs with collapsible items, optional grouping by category, and search filtering. Built on top of Accordion primitives and composed of FAQSection, FAQItem, FAQQuestion, FAQAnswer, and FAQSearchInput sub-components. Supports keyboard navigation, animated expand/collapse, and i18n labels via ConfigProvider.
useCases: Marketing landing-page FAQ blocks answering pricing, features, and security questions
Support-center help articles organized by category (Billing, Technical, Account)
Onboarding wizards with expandable step explanations and troubleshooting tips
E-commerce product pages addressing shipping, returns, and warranty policy questions
usage: import { FAQSection, FAQItem, FAQQuestion, FAQAnswer, FAQSearchInput } from "shadcn-solid-components/hoc/faq-section"
